topicPrefixHelp: One or more MQTT topic prefixes, separated by commas (e.g. tasmota,home)
clearFolders: Clean all device folders on adapter start
clearFoldersHelp: Removes all discovered device channels/states on next adapter start and rebuilds them automatically.
clientTimeoutHelp: Timeout for the MQTT connection in seconds
processTeleSensorHelp: Process sensor telemetry messages (tele/xxx/SENSOR) and create datapoints
processTeleStateHelp: Process state telemetry messages (tele/xxx/STATE) and create datapoints
processStatResultHelp: Process result messages (stat/xxx/RESULT) for command confirmations
objectTreeHelp: Store nested JSON data as folder structure in the object tree (instead of flat notation with underscores)
